steps.title: Add 600 µL of lysis solution...
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of lysis solution to each well of the deep-well plate and resuspend the pellet.

steps.title: Prepare the lysis solution by adding...
steps.instruction: Prepare the lysis solution by adding 165 µL of proteinase K to 66 mL of homemade lysis buffer and mix well.

steps.title: Cover with an adhesive aluminum foil...
steps.instruction: Cover with an adhesive aluminum foil and incubate at 55 °C for 01:00:00 .

steps.title: While still warm, add 260 µL...
steps.instruction: While still warm, add 260 µL of ethanol 100%, without overmixing. Overmixing will result in DNA agglomeration and difficulty with the extraction.

steps.title: Transfer immediately to a deep-well plate...
steps.instruction: Transfer immediately to a deep-well plate fitted with an array of silica columns.

steps.title: Centrifuge twice at 3270 x g, °C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge twice at 3270 x g, °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Discard flowthrough and add 500 µL of wash solution
steps.instruction: Discard flowthrough and add 500 µL of wash solution.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3000 x g, °C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3000 x g, °C, 10 minutes

steps.title: Discard flowthrough
steps.instruction: Discard flowthrough.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3000 x g, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3000 x g, °C, 5 minutes to eliminate traces of wash solution.

steps.title: Discard flowthrough
steps.instruction: Discard flowthrough.

steps.title: Add a collector plate between the...
steps.instruction: Add a collector plate between the silica column array and the deep-well plate.

steps.title: Add 50 µL of low TE...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of low TE to the silica matrix in each well.

steps.title: Cover with an adhesive aluminum foil...
steps.instruction: Cover with an adhesive aluminum foil and incubate at 55 °C for 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 3270 x g, °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 3270 x g, °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Put the contaminated silica array on an empty deep-well plate
steps.instruction: Put the contaminated silica array on an empty deep-well plate. Add 150 µL of 1N NaOH + 0.15%(v/v) Triton X-100 to each well.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00

steps.title: Add 200 µL of 1,5N HCl+...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of 1,5N HCl+ 0,15% (v/v) Triton X-100 to each well.

steps.title: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 2 minutes

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:30:00

steps.title: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 2 minutes

steps.title: Add 150 µL of 1N NaOH...
steps.instruction: Add 150 µL of 1N NaOH + 0,15%(v/v) Triton X-100 to each well.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00

steps.title: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 2 minutes

steps.title: Collect the flowthrough in a beaker
steps.instruction: Collect the flowthrough in a beaker. Neutralize pH if needed and dispose of the flow through.

steps.title: Add 600 µL of ddH 2 O to each well
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL of ddH 2 O to each well.

steps.title: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 3000 x g, °C, 5 minutes

steps.title: Silica columns array are ready to be reused
steps.instruction: Silica columns array are ready to be reused.

steps.title: Repeat steps 7 and 8
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 7 and 8.
